The '''Armored Scout Tank (AST)''' was a [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] vehicle used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] and later by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].

==Characteristics==
The Armored Scout Tank was designed as a light reconnaissance variant of the [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tank]]. It was piloted by a single [[OOM pilot battle droid/Legends|OOM pilot battle droid]], and was armed with a high-powered twin [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]].<ref name="SWE1tl" /> Although the bottom of the vehicle appears to bear artillery tubes such as those found on the AST's larger counterpart, the [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|Armored Assault Tank]], they do not appear to be functional.

==History==
The AST was used by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] during the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].
ASTs commonly operated in formations of three, and were often used for hit-and-run missions.<ref name="SWE1tl" /> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], AST units were used for lightning strikes and as support elements in larger [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] military operations.<ref name="SWTCWtl" /> These were light combat vehicles as compared to the AAT tank units.<ref name="SWE1tl" />

{{Veh-stub}}
